name: invocation missing any required flag exits 2 with a specific 'required' diagnostic on stderr
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-refresh.sh" --url http://example/x 2>e.err; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q '\-\-target-namespace required' e.err && echo usage-error-missing-required-args 1>&2
